# aer_simulartor_unitary

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator
import numpy as np

circ = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
circ.ry(np.pi/4, 0)
unitary_circ = circ.copy()
unitary_circ.save_unitary()
```

```{python}
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator
from qiskit import transpile

sim = AerSimulator(method="unitary")
tqc = transpile(unitary_circ, sim)
job = sim.run(tqc)
result = job.result()
unitary_matrix = result.get_unitary()
print(unitary_matrix)
```
